name: Nova Survivors
short_description: A sci-fi survivor game focused on fast-paced combat and deep meta-progression. This is no walk in the park. You'll land on a hostile alien planet and face relentless waves of monsters. The only way to survive this hell is to fight, upgrade, and permanently strengthen yourself!
detailed_description:
Nova Survivors is a sci-fi survivor game focused on fast-paced combat and deep meta-progression. You'll land on a hostile alien planet and face relentless waves of monsters. The only way to survive this hell is to fight, upgrade, and permanently strengthen yourself!

Adrenaline-Pumping, Fast-Paced Combat

This is no walk in the park. From the very first second, you'll be swarmed by hordes of monsters. We've meticulously designed the enemy waves to give you a thrilling experience, from desperately struggling to survive to clearing the entire screen in an instant. Use your dash to dodge fatal attacks and find a sliver of hope in a hail of bullets. Every second will get your heart racing!

Build Your Unique Arsenal

From the classic Shotgun to the auto-targeting Sentry Gun, from the path-burning Flamewalker to the chain-clearing Tesla Arc, the game offers dozens of weapons and skills. Through in-game upgrades, you can create countless combat builds. Will you choose the orbiting Saw Blade or the sky-falling High-Explosive Grenade? Discover the amazing synergies between them and create your ultimate winning combination.

Accumulate, Grow Stronger, Fight Again!

Death is not the end, but the beginning of becoming stronger. Use the resources collected in battle for permanent meta-upgrades. Enhance your Max HP, increase Movement Speed, reduce Dash Cooldown, and even boost your EXP Gain Rate and Loot Radius. Every upgrade will help you go further in your next challenge, constantly pushing your limits!
